name: @ondewo/s2t-client-typescript
description: ONDEWO Speech to Text (S2T) Client library for Typescript
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest: rm -rf .test-build && tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build && tsc examples/ts-client.ts examples/ts-client.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build && cp -R api .test-build/api
